expectations.evidence: Identified By Rock as project ID 7
Called list-drive-images to browse folder structure
Noted no Marco folder but did NOT find March photos in Week 2026 subfolder. Fell back to catalog search.
Loaded and analyzed 13 thumbnails across 2 batches

expectations.evidence: Identified By Rock as project ID 7
Called list-drive-images to browse folders
Found March photos in Week 2026 subfolder with 15 photos dated March 26, 2026
Loaded thumbnails for the March photos
All 5 recommendations are lunch-appropriate with specific usage suggestions

notes: Without skill, agent explored Drive more freely and found the actual March photos
setup-project-loaded passes 100% in both configs — non-discriminating assertion
Skill adds strong value in structured output (justifications, story sequence, script instructions)
Eval 3 reveals a weakness: skill biases toward catalog search over Drive exploration when folder not found by exact name
Without-skill agent used fewer tokens in 2/3 evals but produced less structured output
Skill adds significant time overhead (+115s avg) due to more thorough catalog searches and multiple filter combinations
